hab : a ≠ b
⊢ IndepFun (fun ω s => rewardByCount a s ω) (fun ω s => rewardByCount b s ω) (Bandit.measure alg ν)

refine indepFun_pi_left_right _ _ ?_
  · exact iIndepFun_rewardByCount' alg ν a
  · exact iIndepFun_rewardByCount' alg ν b
  · intro n m
    have h_indep : IndepFun (rewardByCount a n) (rewardByCount b m) 𝔓 := by
      cases' Nat.eq_zero_or_pos n with hn hn <;> cases' Nat.eq_zero_or_pos m with hm hm <;>
        simp_all [rewardByCount_zero]
      all_goals
        apply indepFun_of_condIndepFun_right
        · exact condIndepFun_reward_stepsUntil_arm a (n + 1) _ (by simp)
        · exact condIndepFun_reward_stepsUntil_arm b (m + 1) _ (by simp)
        · exact fun_prop
        · exact fun_prop
    exact h_indep

    (iIndepFun_rewardByCount alg ν) ?_

  rintro ⟨rfl, rfl⟩
  exact hab
